title: 관계대명사절 (형용사절)
instruction: 다음 문장에서 관계대명사절을 찾아 [ ]로 묶고, 우리말로 해석해 보세요.

problems.stem: The woman who works at the bank is my aunt.

answer.analysis: The woman [who works at the bank] is my aunt.
answer.translation: 은행에서 일하는 그 여자는 나의 이모이다.

problems.stem: I want to buy the jacket which I saw in the magazine.

answer.analysis: I want to buy the jacket [which I saw in the magazine].
answer.translation: 나는 내가 잡지에서 봤던 그 재킷을 사고 싶

problems.stem: The man that you talked to is a famous actor.

answer.analysis: 다. The man [that you talked to] is a famous actor.
answer.translation: 네가 이야기했던 그 남자는 유명한 배우이다.

problems.stem: This is the key that opens the front door.

answer.analysis: This is the key [that opens the front door].

problems.stem: The food which my mom cooked was delicious.

answer.analysis: The food [which my mom cooked] was delicious.

problems.stem: I have a friend who can speak four languages.

answer.analysis: I have a friend [who can speak four languages].
answer.translation: 나는 4개 국어를 할 수 있는 친구가 있다.

problems.stem: The email that you sent me didn't arrive.

answer.analysis: The email [that you sent me] didn't arrive.
answer.translation: 네가 나에게 보냈던 이메일이 도착하지 않았다.

problems.stem: He told a story that wasn't true.

answer.analysis: He told a story [that wasn't true].

problems.stem: The dog which is barking loudly belongs to my neighbor.

answer.analysis: The dog [which is barking loudly] belongs to my neighbor.
answer.translation: 시끄럽게 짖고 있는 저 개는 내 이웃의 것

problems.stem: The people who live in this city are worried about air pollution.

answer.analysis: 이다. The people [who live in this city] are worried about air pollution.
answer.translation: 이 도시에 사는 사람들은 대기 오
